FFR Trends — Weekly

FFR 0-1

Early-stage roll rate into first missed payment

FFR 1-2

Conditional roll from 1st to 2nd missed payment

FFR 2-3

Roll from 30-59 DPD to 60-89 DPD

FFR 3-4

Roll from 60-89 DPD to 90-119 DPD

FFR 4-5 (Charge-off Roll Rate)

Roll from 90-119 DPD to 120+ DPD

Data Story canonical — frontbook summary (matured cohort · ex fraud)

Matured cohort from credit_first_pmt_dq (Data Story). Vintage / weekly panels below use CREDIT_UK_MOB_DQ4/DQ30_VINTAGE — definitions differ; both are maintained as UK monitoring sources. Data Story frontbook

First Payment DQ — Weekly Trend ACTUAL · WEEKLY COHORTS
ℹ️ Each point = origination cohort for that week, measured at day 5 (FPDQ4+) and day 30 (FPDQ30+) after first payment due. FPDQ30 shows null for cohorts not yet 30-day mature.

FPDQ4+ and FPDQ30+ — Weekly Origination Cohorts

% ever 4d+ overdue (blue) and % overdue at 30 days (orange) per origination week

Active Forbearance Stock LATEST MONTH
Active Forb Balance
—
Principal balance in active arrangement
Active Forb Users
—
Unique users in active arrangement
Uptake Rate
—
% active users in forbearance
Deferral Share
—
Payment deferral % of active stock
Note — Forbearance Approval Rate: The loan tape only contains approved forbearance arrangements; request and application data are not available in these tables. The Approval Rate (requests approved ÷ requests submitted) cannot be computed. Uptake Rate above is a stock-based proxy: active forbearance users ÷ total active users.
Forbearance Trend — Monthly STOCK

Active Forbearance Stock

User count (bars, left) and balance (line, right) in active forbearance by month

Forbearance Uptake Rate

Active forbearance users as % of total active users — stock-based proxy for uptake

Forbearance Type Mix PAYMENT DEFERRAL · RE-AMORTIZATION

Type Mix by Month — Loan Count

Active stock: payment deferral vs re-amortization (stacked, not settled/charged-off)

Type Mix by Month — Balance (£)

Outstanding principal balance split by arrangement type

Forbearance Cohort Outcomes RE-DEFAULT TRACKING
ℹ️ Tracks loans in active forbearance at each cohort month. Status checked 3 and 6 months later via the corresponding loan tape. Arrears re-entry rate = % overdue or charged-off at follow-up. 12-month horizon not yet available (data starts Oct 2025).

Cohort Status Distribution at 3m & 6m

Stacked % showing outcomes (current / settled / overdue / charged-off) for Oct and Nov 2025 cohorts

Arrears Re-entry Rate at 3m & 6m

% of forbearance cohort that is overdue or charged-off at follow-up horizon

CohortLoans Current @3mSettled @3mOverdue @3mC/O @3mRe-entry (3m) Current @6mSettled @6mOverdue @6mC/O @6mRe-entry (6m)
